creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

OK, your patch was missing a MAN3 update (curl_printf.3 -> curl_mprintf.3), 
but other than that, it's fine. 

I'll have to check if ports depending on Curl might be affected by this 
upgrade, and in particular, by the FILE * -> void * change in callback 
functions.
